title: Display item info in link previews
excerpt: When adding a link on Slack (or any other environment where link previews occur) the link preview has no context to the item or board, it’s always “welcome to monday.com”. It would be improved if the link preview shows a…

posts.author: dawnasks (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml: When adding a link on Slack (or any other environment where link previews occur) the link preview has no context to the item or board, it’s always “welcome to monday.com”. It would be improved if the link preview shows at least the title of the board, item, etc. in the link preview (similar to what Asana does).
